title: lolium perenne var. compositum
intro: Lolium perenne var. compositum, also known as perennial ryegrass, is a variety of Lolium perenne that is a type of flowering grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lolium perenne var. compositum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting respiratory health. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the preparation method and individual tolerance.
